Original question:
Solve this Super-Eywa grading-bank question.
Question ID: architecture-derived-B7-sarcasm-classification
Title: B7. Sarcasm Classification

Problem:
Classify three Reddit replies as sarcastic (0) or non-sarcastic (1).
Determine the 3-bit pattern.

Grading target:
Exact match on the 3-bit string.

Return format:
FINAL_ANSWER: <your answer>
JUSTIFICATION: <brief justification>

Draft answer:
CRITICAL ERROR: The input data is incomplete. The problem requires the classification of three specific Reddit replies, but the text of these replies was not provided in the prompt. Without the content of the replies, it is impossible to determine if they are sarcastic (0) or non-sarcastic (1) and thus impossible to derive the 3-bit pattern.
